24: The following code example illustrates the ParallelAgent pattern within the Google
25: ADK, which facilitates the concurrent execution of multiple agent tasks. The
26: data_gatherer is designed to run two sub-agents concurrently: weather_fetcher and
27: news_fetcher. The weather_fetcher agent is instructed to get the weather for a given
28: location and store the result in session.state["weather_data"]. Similarly, the
29: news_fetcher agent is instructed to retrieve the top news story for a given topic and
30: store it in session.state["news_data"]. Each sub-agent is configured to use the
31: "gemini-2.0-flash-exp" model. The ParallelAgent orchestrates the execution of these
32: sub-agents, allowing them to work in parallel. The results from both weather_fetcher
33: and news_fetcher would be gathered and stored in the session state. Finally, the
